definitions: n. 天赋（在此语境下指感知与识别能力）

examples.text: Not only can your dog sense when you have a cold, but domestic dogs have shown an aptitude for detecting both much smaller mood fluctuations and far more serious physical conditions.
examples.explanation: 不仅你的狗能察觉你感冒了，家犬还展现出对检测更细微的情绪波动和更严重身体状况的天赋。

reviewSessions.example_text: Not only can your dog sense when you have a cold, but domestic dogs have shown an aptitude for detecting both much smaller mood fluctuations and far more serious physical conditions.
expected_definitions: n. 天赋（在此语境下指感知与识别能力）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了核心含义。
